card_description: Wordsworth is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 2 Exegesis passages. Context: "Dick explores the "Adoptionalist" theory of his experience: that he was "raised" to a superhuman level and "incorporated" into the building of the New Earth."
